creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a Microsoft Bluetooth Notebook Mouse 5000 connected to my laptop via a Broadcom BCM20702A0 USB dongle.

It has stopped working after I upgraded from a February version of CURRENT to r282338 yesterday. Whenever I try to do something with the mouse like moving it or clicking, I just get the following message:

ng_l2cap_l2ca_con_rsp_req: ubt0l2cap - unexpected L2CA_ConnectRsp request message. Channel does not exist, lcid=64
[where lcid's value keeps increasing]
